name: copilot-cost-tracker
description: Track and visualize your GitHub Copilot usage costs.

copilotCostTracker.plan.description: Your GitHub Copilot plan type. Changing this auto-sets the budget credits.

copilotCostTracker.budgetCredits.description: Total credit budget for the billing period. Set via 'Set Monthly Budget' command or manually.

copilotCostTracker.budgetWarningThreshol.description: Percentage thresholds at which budget warnings trigger (e.g., [75, 90, 100]).

copilotCostTracker.billingCycleStartDay.description: Day of month when the billing cycle resets (1-31). If the day exceeds the month length, the last day of the month is used.

copilotCostTracker.pollIntervalMin.description: Deprecated. This setting is no longer used by the event-driven watcher.
copilotCostTracker.pollIntervalMin.markdownDeprecationMessage: This setting is no longer used. The extension now uses an event-driven file watcher with `#copilotCostTracker.pollIntervalMax#` as a fallback.

copilotCostTracker.pollIntervalMax.description: Fallback poll interval in milliseconds. Used as a safety net in case the file watcher misses events.

copilotCostTracker.refreshDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay (ms) after a file change event before ingesting new data. Collapses rapid successive events into one update.

copilotCostTracker.telemetrySource.description: Data source for Copilot usage. 'auto' uses traces DB with JSONL fallback. Override to force a specific source.

copilotCostTracker.initialScanDays.description: Number of days to scan on first activation. Use 'Scan Full History' command for complete backfill.

copilotCostTracker.retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain turn data. Older turns are pruned periodically.

copilotCostTracker.customModelRates.description: Custom pricing rates for unlisted models. Keys are model names, values are objects with 'input' and 'output' fields (credits per 1M tokens).

copilotCostTracker.logLevel.description: Log verbosity for the Copilot Cost Tracker output channel.

copilotCostTracker.excludedModels.description: Models to exclude from cost tracking (e.g., code completion models). Uses substring matching.

copilotCostTracker.enabledFileExtensions.description: File extensions that enable inline prompt token and cost preview.

copilotCostTracker.showStatusBar.description: Show live cost indicator in the status bar.

copilotCostTracker.contextWeightNotifica.description: Show warnings when the active chat session accumulates heavy context (20K, 40K, 80K tokens). Each new message resends the entire conversation history.

copilotCostTracker.pricingUrl.description: URL to a remote pricing JSON file. Leave empty to use built-in pricing.

copilotCostTracker.excludeUnknownModelsF.description: When enabled, turns for models that are missing built-in and custom pricing are excluded from totals (cost=0) and flagged in the dashboard.

copilotCostTracker.microTurnGapSeconds.description: Maximum seconds between consecutive turns in the same session to be counted as a 'micro-turn' ping-pong pattern.

copilotCostTracker.microTurnMinCount.description: Minimum number of consecutive rapid turns required to trigger the Micro-Turn Bloat alert.

copilotCostTracker.microTurnMaxOutputTok.description: Maximum average output tokens per turn for a rapid sequence to be classified as micro-turn bloat.

copilotCostTracker.rawPasteMinInputToken.description: Minimum net (uncached) input tokens in a single turn to trigger the Raw Paste alert.

copilotCostTracker.premiumMisallocationM.description: Minimum credits consumed in a single turn (combined with low output) to trigger the Premium Model Misallocation alert.
Maximum output tokens in a turn for it to be considered a 'trivial task' for the Premium Model Misallocation alert.

copilotCostTracker.agentSprawlMinInputTo.description: Minimum input tokens in a single turn to trigger the Massive Context Turn alert.

scripts.build: npm run build:webview && esbuild ./src/extension.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/extension.js --external:vscode --format=cjs --platform=node --sourcemap && node scripts/copy-assets.js
